\tzpentry{ID4414}{Combo Pi Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4414 introduces Combo Pi Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} V_{\pi}\bigl[k\bigr] &= \sum_{n\ge 1} \Theta\!\bigl(k - \lfloor \pi \rfloor\bigr) \,\delta\!\left( k - \lfloor \pi \rfloor - \frac{d_n(\pi)}{10} \right), \\ \Hhat_{\mathrm{ent}} &= J \sum_{(i,j)\in\Lambda} \sigma^{z}_{i,\mathrm{in}}(\theta_1^\ast,\phi_1^\ast) \otimes \sigma^{z}_{j,\mathrm{out}}(\theta_2^\ast,\phi_2^\ast) \,e^{-|r_{ij}|/\xi_{\pi}}, \end{align}
